bugs.title: Generic team page only handled NHL routes
bugs.summary: MLB drill-downs like /team/OAK rendered 'Team not found' because the generic team page and API were NHL-only.
bugs.notes: Fixed by making generic team pages detect league and support MLB data paths.

bugs.title: Full admin QA backlog needs structured tracking
bugs.summary: Bugs and cron jobs were being tracked ad hoc in chat instead of in one IT review surface.
bugs.notes: Initial admin ops surface created, but should keep evolving with more operational controls.

cronSchedules.name: QA cycle
cronSchedules.purpose: Run structured QA checks across pages, picks, APIs, and odds coverage.
cronSchedules.notes: Keep this aligned with heartbeat + any Vercel cron coverage.

cronSchedules.name: PGA DataGolf scrape
cronSchedules.purpose: Refresh cached tournament data before picks generation.
cronSchedules.notes: Backed by vercel.json cron during tournament windows.

cronSchedules.name: Market snapshot capture
cronSchedules.purpose: Archive conservative hourly NHL/NBA/MLB aggregated odds snapshots for line-history, freshness, and cadence drift tracking.
cronSchedules.notes: Conservative cadence by design to limit upstream load while seeding usable history. Admin health now flags stale cadence and stale upstream books from day 1.

cronSchedules.name: NBA Q1/Q3 daily archive
cronSchedules.purpose: Capture a dedicated daily NBA checkpoint so quarter-spread rails have an explicit archive target for Goose-style settlement and audit work.
cronSchedules.notes: Separate from the hourly multi-sport snapshot so quarter-market capture has a named daily checkpoint.

cronSchedules.name: Systems refresh
cronSchedules.purpose: Refresh system rails daily so Goose/MLB/NHL health surfaces update even before manual page loads.
cronSchedules.notes: Backed by vercel.json cron. Treat missing success as an operational issue because source placement checks start day 1.
